message:
refactor(sql): add LanceColumnType for unified type detection

Consolidates 33 occurrences of duplicated logical_type string matching
into a single LanceColumnType.fromLogicalType() function. Applied to:
- preloadColumns
- readColumnAtIndices
- readJoinKeyColumn
- readJoinedColumnData

Net reduction: -35 lines (executor.zig: 4,233 → 4,155)
